svg.title: Upstream Sync Monitor
svg.desc: systemd timer monitors 3 upstream repos, merges changes into fork main, creates GitHub Issues

span.p:
git merge upstream/main
into fork main

span.p:
Abort merge
GitHub Issue:
conflict
+ email

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Save upstream SHAs
to state file
